devicefarm.instanceprofile.Description.Docs: The description of the instance profile.

devicefarm.instanceprofile.ExcludeAppPac.Docs: An array of strings containing the list of app packages that should not be cleaned up from the device after a test run completes.  The list of packages is considered only if you set `packageCleanup` to `true`.

devicefarm.instanceprofile.Name.Docs: The name of the instance profile.

devicefarm.instanceprofile.PackageCleanu.Docs: When set to `true`, Device Farm removes app packages after a test run. The default value is `false` for private devices.

devicefarm.instanceprofile.RebootAfterUs.Docs: When set to `true`, Device Farm reboots the instance after a test run. The default value is `true`.

devicefarm.instanceprofile.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html) in the *AWS CloudFormation resource type reference guide*.
